resume.raw_text:
=== Ismatu Barry - Resume.pdf ===
Ismatu Barry 
(929) 535-2493 |  Ismatu.barry@jjay.cuny.edu 
 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com 

Education 
John Jay College of Criminal Justice, CUNY  
Bachelor of Arts in Political Science, Minor in Public Administration  
GPA: 3.862 | Dean’s List 

Expected Graduation May 2027 

Experience 

P.S./I.S.224 
Paraprofessional  

          Nov 2025 – Present 

●  Support teachers with classroom instruction and lesson preparation. 
●  Provide one-on-one and small group assistance to students to enhance learning 

outcomes. 

●  Maintain a safe, structured, and inclusive classroom environment. 
●  Assist with administrative duties such as attendance tracking and material 

organization. 

●  Monitor student behavior and reinforce school policies and expectations. 

International Community High School 
Administrative Assistant & School Aide  

       Sep 2024 –  Oct 2025 

●  Managed staff schedules, coordinated meetings, and maintained organized records. 
●  Prepared reports, correspondence, and materials for school programs and events. 
●  Provided clerical support to administrators and faculty to ensure smooth daily 

operations. 

●  Supervised students during lunch periods and hallway transitions to ensure safety. 
●  Acted as a point of contact for students, staff, and visitors, delivering professional 

support. 

Accurate Communications   
Translator & Interpreter 

Jul 2023 – Present 

●  Translated legal, immigration, and official documents between English, French, and 

Fulani. 

●  Interpreted conversations between attorneys and clients to ensure accurate 

communication. 

●  Maintained strict confidentiality when handling sensitive legal information. 
●  Facilitated communication in confidential legal and administrative contexts. 

Allied,| Shelter 
Security Guard 

                                          Oct 2022 – 2025 

●  Monitored building access and verified identification to maintain security protocols. 
●  Conducted regular patrols to ensure safety of residents and staff. 
●  Responded to incidents and emergencies following established procedures. 
●  Documented daily activities and security reports accurately. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
          
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Languages:  

●  Fulani (Native) 
●  French (Native) 
●  English (Fluent) 

Skills   

●  Public Speaking & Presentations 
●  Multilingual Communication 
●  Time Management & Organization 
●  Teamwork & Communication 
●  Attention to Detail 
●  Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
